mapper.insert: INSERT INTO WORK_ORDER (ORDER_ID, ORDER_NO, ORDER_TYPE, DEVICE_ID, APPLICANT_ID, HANDLER_ID, PRIORITY, DESCRIPTION, STATUS) VALUES (SEQ_WORK_ORDER.NEXTVAL, #{orderNo}, #{orderType}, #{deviceId}, #{applicantId}, #{handlerId}, #{priority}, #{description}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE WORK_ORDER SET ORDER_TYPE = #{orderType}, DEVICE_ID = #{deviceId}, APPLICANT_ID = #{applicantId}, HANDLER_ID = #{handlerId}, PRIORITY = #{priority}, DESCRIPTION = #{description} WHERE ORDER_ID = #{orderId}
UPDATE WORK_ORDER SET HANDLER_ID = #{handlerId}, STATUS = '处理中' WHERE ORDER_ID = #{orderId}
